title: [codereview] ipv6_addr.c: inconsistent logging prefix in lichen_eui64_to_iid and lichen_pubkey_to_iid
description: LOG_ERR messages still use 'ipv6_addr:' instead of module name 'lichen_ipv6:'. Matches the pattern in new function. Discovered during first codereview pass after fixing new function. tagged codereview
notes: Fixed all 'ipv6_addr: ' logging prefixes in both copies of ipv6_addr.c (lichen/subsys and firmware/bridge). 3 parallel codereview passes (correctness via grep on LOG_ patterns, security via null/secure_zero checks, edge cases via error path coverage) found no issues. Quality gate: consistent with LOG_MODULE_REGISTER(lichen_ipv6). No dead code, test integrity preserved.
close_reason: Fixed as part of main issue
